title: Strategic Accounts
shortSummary: Your top 10 accounts deserve a different approach. Learn key account planning, executive alignment, QBR strategy, and long-term partnership building.
whyItMatters: In most B2B businesses, 20% of accounts drive 80% of revenue. Strategic account management is about maximising the lifetime value of your most important customers. It requires a different skillset from net-new sales — you need to think like a general manager, building multi-threaded relationships, creating joint business plans, and becoming so embedded in the customer's business that switching costs are enormous.
coreConcepts: Land-and-expand paths across departments and buying centers
Joint business plans and shared success metrics
Quarterly Business Reviews that drive expansion
